title: pouzolzia indica subvar. microphylla
intro: Pouzolzia indica subvar. microphylla is a variant of the Pouzolzia indica plant, a type of flowering succulent native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pouzolzia indica subvar. microphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a potential treatment for infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water, which can then be used as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
